title: Department Manager Vacancy at Heritage Foods Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Heritage Foods Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Heritage Foods Retail are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Heritage Foods Retail:
Heritage Foods Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
